# Suwol Visual Reference Release

## Downloads

- Windows ZIP
- Linux AppImage
- SHA-256 checksums

## Notes

See the version-specific release notes under `docs/release-notes/`.

Windows builds may show a SmartScreen warning because they are not code-signed yet.

Suwol Visual Reference is licensed under Apache-2.0. Third-party package notices are included in `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`.
